Plan a week-long trip to Japan for 2 people in April 2026. We're into food and culture.

I don't love those flight options. They're all too expensive or have bad layovers. Can you search again with more flexible dates? Maybe a day or two earlier or later. Also check flights into Osaka instead of Tokyo.
Hmm, I'm not sold on your city itinerary either. You're packing in too many places. I'd rather spend more time in fewer cities and actually get to know them. Cut it down to just 2 cities max.
Those hotels are way too pricey. We're not backpackers but we don't need luxury either. Find us something more like $120-150/night range. And honestly I'd prefer a well-reviewed Airbnb over a hotel.

OK the day plans are too packed. We're not the type to wake up at 7am and hit 5 attractions. Scale it way back -- one main thing in the morning, free afternoon to explore on our own, and a great dinner spot. That's it.
